# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function add: int (a: int, b: int)
  entry:
      t1 = ADD a_1, b_1
      RETURN t1

function mul: int (a: int, b: int)
  entry:
      t2 = MUL a_1, b_1
      RETURN t2

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t3 = CALL add, 5, 3
      x_1 = t3
      t4 = CALL mul, x_1, 2
      y_1 = t4
      RETURN y_1
